changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs (line 1)

The original `mod.rs` had a detailed 30-line module-level doc comment describing the architecture, security considerations, process isolation model, and rate limiting. The new `mod.rs` has only a 9-line operational summary listing the six operations.

The deleted content included:
- Architecture rationale (why tokio timeout, why process isolation)
- Security considerations checklist
- Rate limiting and resource monitoring notes

This documentation does not belong in any single operation module and there is now nowhere for it to live.

Suggestion: Restore the architecture/security sections to `mod.rs` to preserve this institutional knowledge for future maintainers."
warning: Old mod.rs module-level doc comment was dropped — useful architecture documentation lost
